body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- full 4-agent process complete, final report. 15 code warrants shipped this session (#33-47, SLS48-62, 9.62-9.76), every one compiled 0-errors and diff-verified individually, PLUS a cumulative identity-invariant audit (pass_35) diffing the whole session against the pre-session SLS(47) baseline: 826 lines added, only 5 removed, and all 5 accounted for (2 version banners, 3 calls that reappear byte-identical inside new brace blocks). This is forge-edge-2 and forge-indicate r8, done. Final stretch this run: WARRANT#46 (forge-parallel Wave 2, optimal-stopping exit via discrete hazard/life-table), #47 (forge-indicate r6 acceptance rule for offline tuning, mirrors the ratchet). All 4 agents now have every legitimately-buildable-without-live-data stage shipped. Genuinely blocked, not just deferred: forge-edge-2 r7 and forge-indicate r7 both need S1-S5/PBO gate criteria this session never found concretely defined anywhere in the available thesis text -- that is a real gap, not a missed search. Both agents true r8 (binary differential replay against real bars) and forge-parallel Wave 3 all need an actual completed, consented Strategy-Tester run. Full detail in forge_ledger.json passes 28 through 35 and memory. Awaiting your direction: a live calibration run, clarifying what S1-S5 should be, or something else entirely.
